name: corrupt_db_text
description: The primary database file is plain text while JSONL remains present and parseable.
source_hint: Derived from the malformed-db repair cases in tests/e2e_workspace_commands.rs and tests/e2e_global_flags.rs.
notes: Represents the simplest non-SQLite database corruption case.
Intended to drive rebuild-or-bypass behavior rather than low-level SQLite recovery.
